title: Epic Knights: Antique Legacy
description: Adds antique stuff as an addition to Epic Knights mod
body:
Epic Knights: Antique legacy addon delves into the forgotten battlefields of history, bringing a treasure trove of antique weaponry and armor to your gameplay experience. It adds a huge variety of armor (71 pieces), 5 new shields, 20 new weapons and 26 decorations.
The addon requires [Epic Knights](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons) mod with all its dependencies to be installed.
Tin is not generated in the world yet. However, you can install any mod that adds tin to be able to melt it together with copper.
![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xODj7fc3/images/7b034282cde6838d011a1d9f9fe2fbad69c1fe02.png)
![weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xODj7fc3/images/d82c95fdf654090288f070ba581e819fc06a6d97.png)
